description: Renovate config for kapp-fab. Groups minor + patch updates by ecosystem so the maintainer reviews one consolidated PR per week rather than dozens. Major bumps are individual so a breaking change can be evaluated on its own merits. The schedule is timed to land outside the maintainer's working hours so a freshly-opened Renovate PR does not interrupt active development.

packageRules.description: Group Go module minor / patch bumps into a single weekly PR.
Group npm devDependency minor / patch bumps so the frontend toolchain (vitest, eslint, typescript) does not generate a flood of PRs.
Pin GitHub Action versions; allow Renovate to bump the pin commit-by-commit. The `helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests` preset (inherited via config:recommended) enforces digest pinning.
Postgres major bumps are operator-coordinated migrations, not routine. Disable major bumps so the dashboard does not nag.

schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month
